Home / Services / Driveway Paving

Driveway Paving

Enhance your home's curb appeal with a durable and stylish paved driveway.

A well-paved driveway is more than just a place to park your car; it's a statement about your home. At Arlington Pavers Inc, we specialize in crafting driveways that are both beautiful and built to last. We handle everything from initial design and excavation to paver installation and sealing. We offer a wide variety of paver materials, colors, and patterns to complement your home's architecture, whether it's a classic 1960s ranch or a modern new build.

Given Arlington's climate, we use paving materials specifically designed to withstand the Texas heat and occasional ice storms. Proper drainage is crucial, and we ensure your driveway is graded correctly to prevent water damage. We also offer repair and maintenance services to keep your driveway looking its best for years to come. From concrete pavers to brick and natural stone, we'll help you choose the perfect material to create a driveway that enhances your property's value and curb appeal.

Our team meticulously prepares the sub-base, ensuring a solid foundation that prevents shifting and cracking. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise paver placement and proper joint spacing for optimal performance. We finish every project with a thorough cleaning and sealing, protecting your investment from the elements.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Assessment and Design Consultation: We evaluate your property and discuss your design preferences.
  2. 02 Step 2: Excavation and Base Preparation: We prepare a solid foundation for your driveway.
  3. 03 Step 3: Paver Installation: We carefully lay each paver according to the approved design.
  4. 04 Step 4: Compaction and Sealing: We compact the pavers and apply a sealant for lasting protection.

Benefits

  • Increased Curb Appeal
  • Enhanced Property Value
  • Durable and Long-Lasting Surface
  • Low Maintenance

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does driveway paving take?

Most driveway paving projects take between 3-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the design.

What types of pavers are best for driveways?

Concrete pavers and brick are excellent choices for driveways due to their durability and resistance to wear and tear.

Do I need a permit for driveway paving?

It depends on the scope of the project and local regulations. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.
